quicksight.template.legendoptions.CfnAbo: The options for the legend setup of a visual.

quicksight.template.legendoptions.Height.Description: The height of the legend. If this value is omitted, a default height is used when rendering.

quicksight.template.legendoptions.Positi.Description: The positions for the legend. Choose one of the following options:  +  `AUTO` +  `RIGHT` +  `BOTTOM` +  `LEFT`

quicksight.template.legendoptions.Title.Description: The custom title for the legend.

quicksight.template.legendoptions.Visibi.Description: Determines whether or not the legend is visible.

quicksight.template.legendoptions.Width.Description: The width of the legend. If this value is omitted, a default width is used when rendering.
